pastEvents.title: Past events
pastEvents.subtitle: Previous editions of QM Fest
pastEvents.description2025: First edition at Parc del Fòrum. A day of celebration with the best queer music and the LGTBIQ+ community.
pastEvents.description2024: Pilot edition. We brought the festival to life with local and international artists.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.subtitle: We want everyone to enjoy QM Fest. Here is the information you need.
accessibility.gettingThereDesc: Parc del Fòrum is accessible by public transport. Metro L4 (El Maresme | Fòrum), Tram T4, and buses 7, 36, 41 stop nearby. Accessible parking is available; contact us for details.
accessibility.ticketsDesc: We offer accessible seating and companion tickets. When buying your ticket, select the accessibility option or write to us so we can arrange the best place for you.
accessibility.toiletsDesc: Accessible toilets are available throughout the venue. Changing places and quiet areas are signposted.
accessibility.supportDesc: Our accessibility and first-aid team will be at clearly marked points. Do not hesitate to ask any staff member for help.

sponsors.title: Sponsors & collaborators
sponsors.subtitle: Thanks to those who make QM Fest possible.
sponsors.ctaTitle: Would you like to collaborate with us?
sponsors.ctaText: If your brand shares our values of diversity and inclusion and you want to support the biggest queer music festival in Barcelona, we'd love to hear from you. Partner with QM Fest and reach an engaged, inclusive audience.

press.title: Press
press.subtitle: Press kit and contact for media.
press.kitDesc: Logos, images and key information about the festival. Download the pack or contact us for high-resolution material.
press.logosDesc: Logo and brand assets available on request. Contact us for high-resolution files.

volunteers.title: Volunteers
volunteers.subtitle: Join the team and be part of QM Fest.
volunteers.description: We are looking for committed people to help with accreditation, info points, and audience care. In return you get free access and the best atmosphere.
volunteers.formMessage: Why do you want to volunteer? (optional)
volunteers.formSuccess: Thank you! We'll get back to you soon.

items.q: When and where is the festival?
items.a: Saturday 25 May 2026 at Parc del Fòrum, Barcelona. Gates open at 4pm.
Tickets are available on our Tickets page. Early Bird, Regular and VIP options.
Yes. The venue has accessible entrances, toilets and viewing areas. Contact us for specific needs.
Tickets are non-refundable except if the event is cancelled. See our Terms for details.
Small bags allowed. No glass, no professional cameras. Full list at the entrance.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Get in touch
contact.formSuccess: Thank you! We'll get back to you soon.

location.title: Location
location.subtitle: Parc del Fòrum, Barcelona
location.description: An iconic space by the Mediterranean Sea
location.transport: Metro: L4 El Maresme | Fòrum. Tram: T4. Bus: 7, 36, 41.

about.title: About the Festival
about.description: A day of celebration of diversity and queer music in Barcelona. A unique experience that brings together the LGTBIQ+ community through art and music.

values.title: Our Values
values.diversityDesc: We celebrate all gender identities and expressions
values.artDesc: Music as a tool for social change

lineup.title: Line-up
lineup.subtitle: Discover the artists that will make the festival vibrate
lineup.pastEditionsText: Want to see who played in previous editions?

legal.privacyIntro: QM Fest respects your privacy. This policy explains how we collect and use your data.
privacySections: We collect the data you provide when buying tickets (email, name) and when you contact us or subscribe to the newsletter.
We use this data to process orders, send confirmations and event updates, and to communicate with you.
We do not sell your data to third parties. We may share data with service providers (e.g. payment processor) strictly necessary for the service.
You can request access, rectification or deletion of your data by writing to us.
legal.cookiesIntro: We use cookies and similar technologies on our website.
cookiesSections: Essential cookies: necessary for the site to function (e.g. language, consent).
Analytics cookies: we may use tools to understand how visitors use the site (anonymous).
You can accept all cookies or only essential ones via the banner. You can change your choice later.

cookiesBanner.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and analytics.

tickets.subtitle: Don't miss this unique experience
tickets.canceledMessage: You canceled the purchase. You can try again whenever you like.
